root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_creditor.accumulate_interest, sc_dep_m_creditor.last_calcint_date FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code = '01' ) )
